data.title: Tropykus to Gradually Shut Down Current Bitcoin Lending Protocol
data.description: Bitcoin lending protocol Tropykus has announced plans to gradually close its current version, permanently disabling deposit and lending functions. According to Foresight News, users will be able to withdraw and repay until July 27, 2026, after which interactions will only be possible directly with smart contracts. The decision is part of a long-term strategic evolution, as the existing framework struggles to meet the security challenges posed by emerging technologies like artificial intelligence. The team advises all users to complete withdrawals and settle loan positions before the deadline.

data.title: Polymarket Prediction Shows Spurs vs. Trail Blazers Betting Trends
data.description:
A recent Polymarket prediction event for the NBA playoffs' Western Conference first-round Game 5 between the San Antonio Spurs and the Portland Trail Blazers has drawn attention. According to Odaily, an account with a 37% win rate (0xdb859a551fcf56e49416160911476bea7307152f) invested over $100,000 on the Spurs to win with a spread of 11.5 points against the Trail Blazers. The opening price was 50¢, but it has since dropped to 48.5¢, resulting in an unrealized loss of approximately $3,000.

The current series score is 3-1 in favor of the Spurs, with Game 5 scheduled to take place today at 9:30 AM UTC+8. The Spurs' starting lineup includes Vassell, Champagnie, Wembanyama, Fox, and Castle, while the Trail Blazers will start Avdija, Kamara, Clingan, Holiday, and Henderson.

data.title: A newly created address received 25,000 ETH from BitGo, worth $57.13 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created address (0x70d...d318) received 25,000 ETH from BitGo, worth $57.13 million. This address may belong to Bitmine.

data.title: Australia's First Quarter CPI Matches Expectations at 1.4%
data.description: Australia's Consumer Price Index (CPI) for the first quarter recorded a quarterly growth rate of 1.4%, aligning with market expectations, according to Jin10. The previous quarter's CPI was 0.6%, indicating a significant increase in inflationary pressures during the first quarter.

data.title: Iran Condemns U.S. Actions on Seized Vessels
data.description: Iran's representative to the United Nations has expressed strong opposition to what it describes as U.S. piracy against Iranian vessels, according to Odaily. In a letter to UN Secretary-General António Guterres, the Iranian envoy stated that Iran reserves the right to retaliate and holds the United States accountable for the implications of its actions on regional and global security. The letter also urged the UN Security Council to demand the immediate release of the seized Iranian ships.

data.title: Puffer Finance Allocates Treasury Funds to DeFi United Rescue Initiative
data.description: Puffer Finance has announced its decision to allocate treasury funds to the DeFi United rescue initiative, led by Aave. According to ChainCatcher, the specific amount of funds contributed by Puffer Finance has not been disclosed. The company believes that robust infrastructure and aligned incentives are crucial for supporting DeFi during critical times.

data.title: An account with a 37% win rate purchased $100,000 in Game 5 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs, where the Spurs defeated the Trail Blazers with a point spread.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in Polymarket's "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 5 Spurs vs. Trail Blazers" prediction event, an account with only a 37% win rate (0xdb859a551fcf56e49416160911476bea7307152f) purchased over $100,000 worth of bets on the Spurs to win by 11.5 points, with an average opening price of 50¢ and a current price of 48.5¢, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $3,000. The Spurs currently lead the NBA Western Conference First Round series 3-1, with Game 5 scheduled for 9:30 AM Beijing time today. The Spurs' starting lineup is Vassell, Jampagne, Wahlbanama, Fox, and Castle; the Trail Blazers' starting lineup is Avdija, Kamara, Klingen, Holiday, and Henderson. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before pricing.

data.title: User Loses Alchemix Yearn yvVault Position Due to Unverified Contract
data.description: A user has reportedly lost their Alchemix Yearn yvVault position, yvWETH, valued at approximately $1 million. According to Foresight News, the loss occurred due to prior authorization of an unverified contract. This contract, created 10 days ago, contains a vulnerability that can be exploited to execute arbitrary calls.

data.title: Yongtai Bio-B Shares Drop Over 51% at Hong Kong Market Open
data.description: Yongtai Bio-B (06978.HK) experienced a significant decline in its stock price, opening with a drop of 51.75% on the Hong Kong stock exchange. According to Jin10, this sharp decrease in share value marks a notable event in the market, reflecting investor reactions and market conditions affecting the company's stock performance.

data.title: U.S. Prepares for Potential Blockade Against Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has reportedly directed his aides to prepare for a potential prolonged blockade against Iran. According to NS3.AI, while no specific timeline has been disclosed, the move is described as a preparatory measure rather than an immediate implementation.

data.title: Bitcoin Worth $4 Million Moved from Deceased's Wallet Amid Theft Investigation
data.description: Approximately $4 million in Bitcoin was moved from Quentin Griffiths' wallet through three transactions shortly after his death in Thailand. According to NS3.AI, the incident was reported to the police by Joel Griffiths six weeks later. Thai authorities are currently investigating the suspected theft.

data.title: Gold fell, and the BTC volatility index rose.

The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 42.00, a daily increase of 0.53%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 58.82, a daily decrease of 2.94%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.02% to 6.83798. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.01% to 159.636. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 0.37% to $102.65 per barrel. Brent crude oil rose 0.29% to $110.73 per barrel. Gate allows users to trade traditional financial market products directly within the platform, providing a one-stop solution for various asset classes including precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration between crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi functionality is fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to conveniently participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities beyond the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Counterpart Secures $50 Million Series C Funding to Expand Specialty Insurance Offerings
data.description: Counterpart, a specialty insurer based in Los Angeles, has successfully closed a $50 million Series C funding round led by Valor Equity Partners, with ongoing support from Vy Capital. According to NS3.AI, this latest round of funding brings Counterpart's total capital raised to over $106 million. The funds will be used to develop new specialty insurance products and support the collateralization of Counterpart Insurance Company. This funding comes at a time when U.S. agencies and courts are intensifying their scrutiny of AI hiring tools, with cases involving companies like Workday and Eightfold AI under review.

data.title: Wall Street Journal: Trump instructs aides to prepare for a prolonged blockade of Iran.
data.description: According to the Wall Street Journal: US President Trump has instructed aides to prepare for a prolonged blockade of Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance to Update Collateral Ratios and Leverage Tiers in May 2026
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, significant updates to collateral ratios and leverage tiers are scheduled for May 1, 2026. These changes will affect various assets under the Portfolio Margin and PM Pro categories. The collateral ratio for assets such as STX, APT, CFX, GRT, MANA, SUSHI, TIA, W, WLD, ZRO, and ASTER will be adjusted from 40% to 30%, with ASTER seeing an increase from 10% to 30%. These adjustments are set to take place at 06:00 (UTC) and are expected to be completed within 30 minutes.

In the PM Pro category, the collateral ratio for INJ will be modified across different rank floors and caps. For instance, the collateral ratio for positions between $800,000 and $1,200,000 will decrease from 100% to 95%, while positions between $1,200,000 and $2,000,000 will see a reduction from 95% to 75%. These changes are designed to optimize the trading environment and risk management for users.

Additionally, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers for several USD-M Perpetual Contracts, including ZENUSDT, EIGENUSDT, 0GUSDT, SUSDT, AUSDT, GALAUSDT, FFUSDT, and EIGENUSDT. The updates will occur at 06:30 (UTC) and are expected to be completed within an hour. Users with existing positions should be aware that these changes may affect their current leverage and margin settings, potentially leading to the expiration of futures running grids. It is advised that users adjust their positions accordingly to avoid any potential liquidation or losses. The collateral ratio changes will also impact the Unified Maintenance Margin Ratio (uniMMR), necessitating close monitoring by users to manage their risk effectively.

data.title: Institutional Capital Faces Barriers to Bitcoin Access, Experts Say
data.description: At Bitcoin 2026, Dylan LeClair highlighted that 99% of institutional capital is currently unable to access Bitcoin or Bitcoin ETFs due to mandates that limit investments to fixed income or specific asset classes. According to NS3.AI, LeClair, along with David Bailey, emphasized that further adoption of Bitcoin hinges on factors such as custody solutions, compliant products, regulatory clarity, and increased participation from corporate balance sheets.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines to 37 Amid Market Shifts
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has decreased to 37, marking a two-point drop from the previous day. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the 90-day performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies, excluding stablecoins and wrapped tokens, in comparison to Bitcoin. This decline indicates a shift in market dynamics, with altcoins underperforming relative to Bitcoin over the specified period.

data.title: Following the death of the co-founder of ASOS, approximately $4 million worth of Bitcoin was transferred from his wallet.
data.description: Following the death of ASOS co-founder Quentin Griffiths in a fall in Thailand, approximately $4 million in assets were transferred from his Bitcoin wallet. The funds were transferred from his online account to unknown locations in three separate transactions within days of his death. His eldest son, Joel, filed a police report six weeks after his father's passing. Thai police are currently investigating the theft. Quentin Griffiths was previously under investigation for suspected fraud and faced multiple legal proceedings and family property disputes before and after his fall.

data.title: Blockchain's Growing Influence in Finance
data.description: Blockchain technology, while its future as the next-generation internet infrastructure remains uncertain, is undeniably becoming a significant force in the financial sector. According to PANews, its presence is increasingly visible and expanding, akin to an elephant in the room.

data.title: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis Addresses Concerns Over CLARITY Act Developer Protections
data.description: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis has responded to journalists' concerns regarding the developer protection clauses in the CLARITY Act. According to Foresight News, Lummis stated that the issue is not a new challenge and efforts are underway to refine the provisions. The aim is to ensure the safety of developers not involved in fund transfers while holding wrongdoers accountable.
